title: Connecticut DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes (Authoritative — CT DAS class specs + P-3B pay plans)
description: Narrative research notes for Connecticut DDS pay: administering agency (CT Dept of Aging and Disability Services, Bureau of Disability Determination Services), the verified Disability Claims Examiner Assistant / Examiner / Specialist / Supervisor series with Salary Group assignments (EB 21 / EH 23 / EQ 25 / EH 28) from CT DAS JobAps class specs and step-grid dollar figures from the official CT DAS P-3B EB/EH/EQ pay plans (eff 2025-07-01), an anti-fabrication methodology note (Firecrawl table-conversion dropped groups and query-mode hallucinated EQ-25; figures taken from local pypdf extraction), and the P-3B / CSEA SEIU Local 2001 bargaining context. Companion to CT/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Connecticut Department of Administrative Services (DAS); CT Dept of Aging and Disability Services (ADS) Bureau of Disability Determination Services
source.title: CT DDS salary research notes (CT DAS JobAps class specs + P-3B pay plans, retrieved 2026-06-02)

update_cadence: annual (CT DAS salary plans, July 1 effective)
notes: Authoritative: Salary Group assignments verified from CT DAS JobAps class specs (7102EB->EB 21, 7103EH->EH 23, 7104EQ->EQ 25, 7105EH->EH 28) and dollar grids from the official CT DAS P-3B pay plans (eff 2025-07-01), extracted locally with pypdf after the Firecrawl markdown dropped groups and query-mode hallucinated EQ-25. Corrections: agency is ADS Bureau of Disability Determination Services (not DSS); plan classification P-3B (not P-2); union appears CSEA SEIU Local 2001 (not AFSCME 714, not deeply re-verified).
